headline: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Attack Kills Two U.S. Troops; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead
summary: Dow Jones futures: An Iran attack killed two U.S. service members. Google earnings and capex guidance will be key this week. Tesla, Intel, GE Vernova also report.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Attack Kills Two U.S. Troops; Google, Tesla, AMD Ahead

headline: NATO's $40 Billion Counter-Drone Push Puts These Defense ETFs in Focus
summary: NATO's $40 billion counter-drone initiative is accelerating defense investment. Here's how ETFs offer exposure to the military drone industry.

headline: If Volatility Stays Low, Here’s What Happens to DIVO’s Monthly Income
summary: DIVO's covered-call strategy looks solid on paper, but two macro forces are quietly working against its monthly payouts in ways most income investors overlook. Here is what the options chain and the Treasury market are signaling right now.

raw.headline: If Volatility Stays Low, Here’s What Happens to DIVO’s Monthly Income
raw.summary: DIVO's covered-call strategy looks solid on paper, but two macro forces are quietly working against its monthly payouts in ways most income investors overlook. Here is what the options chain and the Treasury market are signaling right now.
